name: Boston Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups dried navy or red beans, soaked overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Rinse and drain beans, cover with fresh water and bring to a boil for 5 minutes. Drain again.
3. Whisk together molasses, brown sugar, dry mustard, cayenne, baking yeast in a bowl, then mix with the beans.
4. Add chopped onions, bay leaves, minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
5. Place mixture in a 2-quart baking dish and add water to cover.
6. Cover and bake until the beans are very soft, 7-8 hours. Check occasionally and add more water if necessary to keep beans from drying out.
7. Remove lid during last half hour of cooking.
